proposedEpicTitle: Extract sToken login flow into reusable boundary component
proposedSpecTaskTitle: Define sToken login boundary component spec

proposedStories.title: Introduce STokenLoginBoundary component
proposedStories.summary: New component, generalized endpoint-resolve hook, extend tokenLogin helper with extraParams (pending Open Question 1), default fallback + error card UI, unit tests.

proposedStories.title: Migrate LoginView sToken path to STokenLoginBoundary
proposedStories.summary: Replace connectUsingSession sToken branch (lines 455–490 of LoginView.tsx) with boundary wrapping; move post-login side effects to onSuccess callback.

proposedStories.title: Migrate EduAppLauncher sToken path to STokenLoginBoundary
proposedStories.summary: Remove _token_login and manual backend-ai-connected dispatch; wrap stepper auth step with boundary; supply errorFallback for stepper-integrated error UI; strip sToken from URL (behavior change).

notes: Draft spec — Jira filing pending. Rename directory to {EPIC-KEY}-stoken-login-boundary once Epic is created, and populate epicKey/specTaskKey fields. `fw` (jira-workflow skill) was not available in the environment at spec creation time.
